user.title: Velux ACTIVE
user.description: Enter your Velux ACTIVE account credentials.

select_home.title: Select Home
select_home.description: Multiple homes were found. Please select the one you want to add.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Please check your email address and password.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Velux ACTIVE cloud. Please try again.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: This Velux home is already configured.

init.title: Velux ACTIVE Options
init.description: Leave HashSignKey and SignKeyId blank to stay polling-only; supply both to enable opening windows. See docs/EXTRACTING_SIGN_KEY.md in the repo for extraction steps.

error.sign_material_partial: Please provide BOTH HashSignKey and SignKeyId, or leave both empty.
error.sign_material_invalid: The signing material could not be parsed. Check the values against docs/EXTRACTING_SIGN_KEY.md.
